entry.title: New: CR 25-60 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 111 (2025), to simplify the application process for the circuit breaker tax credit by allowing homeowners who are at least 78 years old to verify income by submitting an affidavit instead of Internal Revenue Service records.

Special Committee on Real Property Tax Reform

View on the council site
